_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: Lysates from HA-mScarlet-NF1-transduced 293T and ipNF95.11b C Schwann cells after 48 h Dox treatment at the indicated concentrations
details: Effectively detected HA-tagged neurofibromin in western blots and demonstrated dose-dependent expression with doxycycline treatment
